proteins: Cod or tilapia fillets (3 lbs) - batch bake
Sardines in olive oil (8 cans) - no cook
Canned salmon (3 cans, 14 oz each) - for patties
vegetables: Cauliflower (3 heads) - for mash and rice
dairy: Cream cheese (12 oz) - for smoked salmon

equipment.oven1: 400°F - fish (2 trays, top/bottom rack), then broccoli/brussels

overview.concept: Fish cooks fast - 2 hours vs 4.75 for meat week

steps.title: START - Prep & Preheat
do: Preheat OVEN #1 to 400°F
Preheat OVEN #2 to 400°F
EGGS: Place 36 eggs in large pot, cover with cold water by 1 inch. Bring to rolling boil on STOVETOP.
SALMON: Pat 4 lbs fillets dry. Season with salt, pepper, garlic powder, dill. Place on 2 sheet pans.
COD: Pat 3 lbs fillets dry. Season with salt, pepper, lemon zest, Italian herbs. Place on sheet pan.
steps.status_after: Both ovens preheating, fish prepped on trays, eggs heating

steps.title: Fish In (3 trays), Bacon Starts
do: OVEN #1: SALMON trays on top and middle racks - 400°F for 15-18 min.
OVEN #2: COD on middle rack - 400°F for 12-15 min (comes out first).
BACON: Load 1 lb into AIR FRYER in batches. 400°F for 10-12 min.
EGGS: Once boiling, cover pot, remove from heat. Set timer for 12 min.
SLOW COOKER #2: Add riced cauliflower (2 heads) with 3 tbsp butter, set to WARM.
steps.status_after: Salmon in Oven #1, cod in Oven #2, bacon crisping, eggs resting, cauli rice warming

steps.title: Cod Out, Prep Veggies
do: COD: Remove from OVEN #2 at 145°F. Set aside.
EGGS: Transfer to ice bath.
BACON: Remove from AIR FRYER, set on paper towels. Do second batch if needed.
Start prepping veggies: cut 3 heads broccoli, halve 3 lbs brussels, slice zucchini, cut peppers.
steps.status_after: Cod done, salmon still cooking, eggs cooling, bacon done

steps.title: Salmon Out, Veggies In
do: SALMON: Remove from OVEN #1 at 145°F. Set aside.
Toss BROCCOLI & BRUSSELS with olive oil, salt, garlic powder. Put on 2 trays.
Toss ZUCCHINI & PEPPERS with olive oil, salt, Italian herbs. Put on tray.
OVEN #1: Broccoli/brussels on both racks (25 min)
OVEN #2: Zucchini/peppers (20 min)
Cut remaining cauliflower florets for mash, peel eggs.
steps.status_after: Both fish done, veggies in both ovens

steps.title: Cauliflower Mash, Shrimp
do: CAULIFLOWER MASH: Add florets (1 head) to pot on STOVETOP, cover with water. Boil 12-15 min until tender.
SHRIMP: Heat 3 tbsp butter + 3 tbsp olive oil in large pan. Sauté 3 lbs shrimp with garlic in batches, 2-3 min per side until pink. Finish with lemon + dill.
SLOW COOKER #1: Start Mediterranean stew base - olive oil, garlic, 2 cans tomatoes, 1 cup olives, capers, herbs. Set to HIGH.
steps.status_after: Shrimp done, cauliflower boiling, stew started, veggies roasting

steps.title: Veggies Out, Finish Mash & Stew
do: ZUCCHINI & PEPPERS: Remove from OVEN #2. Set aside.
BROCCOLI & BRUSSELS: Remove from OVEN #1. Set aside.
CAULIFLOWER MASH: Drain well, process with 6 tbsp butter, 1/2 cup cream, salt, garlic powder.
SLOW COOKER #1: Add 1.5 lbs cod chunks to stew. Let cook 10 min.

steps.title: Prep Fresh Items
do: SLAW: Thinly slice 1/2 cabbage. Toss with mayo, vinegar, salt/pepper.
DRESSING: Shake olive oil + vinegar + Dijon + garlic.
Wash and prep greens, slice cucumber, rinse berries.
Peel remaining eggs.

steps.title: Portion Grab-and-Go Containers (2-person portions)
do: BAKED SALMON BOWLS (7 containers): Each = HIM 8oz + HER 5oz salmon + cauli mash + mixed veggies + butter
LEMON HERB COD PLATES (6 containers): Each = HIM 7oz + HER 5oz cod + brussels + zucchini
SHRIMP & VEGGIE BOWLS (6 containers): Each = HIM 8oz + HER 6oz shrimp + riced cauliflower + peppers/broccoli
MEDITERRANEAN STEW (5 containers): Ladle from SLOW COOKER #1, HIM gets more fish chunks
Label containers with H (him) and S (she) portions

steps.title: Fresh Containers, Snacks, Cleanup
do: DEVILED EGGS: Halve 12 eggs, mash yolks with mayo + Dijon. Fill, dust with paprika.
SALAD BASES (7): 3 cups mixed greens each
NIÇOISE TOPPINGS (4): olives + tomatoes + capers
COBB TOPPINGS (4): bacon + egg + cheese
Organize fridge, clean up
DONE at 2:00!
steps.status_after: DONE! 24 grab-and-go + fresh kits + snacks for 2

timeline_summary: 12:00 - Prep fish on trays, start eggs, preheat both ovens
12:15 - Both fish in Oven #1 (2 racks), bacon in air fryer, cauli rice in Slow Cooker #2
12:27 - Cod out, eggs to ice bath, bacon done, prep veggies
12:33 - Salmon out, veggies into both ovens
12:45 - Shrimp + cauli mash on stovetop, start stew in Slow Cooker #1
12:55 - Veggies out, finish mash, add cod to stew

grab_and_go: 7 Baked Salmon Bowls (2-person: 8oz + 5oz salmon + mash + veggies)
6 Lemon Herb Cod Plates (2-person: 7oz + 5oz cod + brussels + zucchini)
6 Shrimp & Veggie Bowls (2-person: 8oz + 6oz shrimp + cauli rice + peppers)
5 Mediterranean Fish Stew (2-person portions, more fish for him)
no_cook_proteins: Canned tuna (4 cans) - mix into salad day-of
Canned salmon (3 cans) - for fresh patties mid-week
extras: Berries + Greek yogurt (48 oz) - for snacks

grab_and_go.name: Baked Salmon Bowl
grab_and_go.instructions: Microwave 2 min or enjoy cold. Add fresh lemon, dill, butter.

grab_and_go.name: Lemon Herb Cod Plate
grab_and_go.instructions: Microwave 2 min. Squeeze fresh lemon, drizzle olive oil.

grab_and_go.name: Shrimp & Veggie Bowl
grab_and_go.container: Garlic shrimp + cauliflower rice + peppers & broccoli
grab_and_go.instructions: Microwave 2 min. Add hot sauce if desired.

grab_and_go.name: Mediterranean Fish Stew
grab_and_go.instructions: Heat on stovetop or microwave 2-3 min. Serve with extra olive oil.

add_fresh.name: Sardine Niçoise Salad
add_fresh.instructions: Arrange greens, top with sardines, eggs, olives, tomatoes, capers. Drizzle dressing generously.

add_fresh.name: Tuna Avocado Lettuce Wraps
add_fresh.instructions: Mix tuna with mayo, lemon, diced egg. Spoon into lettuce cups. Top with avocado slices.

add_fresh.name: Smoked Salmon Plate
add_fresh.instructions: Arrange salmon on plate. Slice cucumber. Spread cream cheese on cucumber rounds, top with salmon, capers, dill.

add_fresh.name: Shrimp Cobb Salad
add_fresh.grab: Salad base + Cobb toppings + shrimp from fridge
add_fresh.instructions: Warm shrimp briefly or serve cold. Arrange on greens with bacon, egg, cheese, avocado in rows. Drizzle dressing.

cook_fresh.name: Garlic Butter Shrimp
ingredients: 17 oz raw shrimp total (reserve from Sunday)
cook_fresh.instructions: Melt butter in pan over medium-high. Add garlic, cook 30 sec. Add shrimp, cook 2-3 min per side until pink. Finish with lemon juice, parsley, pepper flakes. Serve over warmed veggies. Plate larger portion for him.

cook_fresh.name: Blackened Cod Tacos
cook_fresh.instructions: Coat cod in blackening spice. Heat oiled pan over high heat. Sear 3-4 min per side until blackened and flaky. Break into chunks. Serve in lettuce wraps with slaw, avocado, lime, hot sauce. More fish for him.

cook_fresh.name: Salmon Patties
ingredients: 3 cans salmon (14 oz each), drained - makes 6-8 patties
1/3 cup almond flour or crushed pork rinds
cook_fresh.instructions: Mix salmon, eggs, almond flour, mustard, dill, salt, pepper. Form into 6-8 patties. Pan-fry in butter 4 min per side until golden. Serve with mayo-dill aioli over dressed greens. 3 patties for him, 2 for her.

snacks.name: Deviled Eggs
snacks.instructions: Halve eggs, mash yolks with mayo and mustard. Fill whites, dust with paprika.

snacks.name: Sardines on Cucumber
snacks.instructions: Top cucumber slices with sardines and their oil. Sprinkle with seasoning.

snacks.name: Smoked Salmon Roll-ups
snacks.instructions: Spread cream cheese on salmon slices. Add dill and capers. Roll up.

snacks.name: Greek Yogurt + Berries + Nuts
snacks.instructions: Top yogurt with berries and nuts.

snacks.name: Bacon & Avocado
snacks.instructions: Top avocado halves with crumbled bacon and seasoning.

snacks.name: Cheese & Veggie Plate
snacks.instructions: Slice cheese, arrange with veggies and olives.

overview.snack_note: Snacks are shared. He gets extra snacks or larger portions to hit targets.

days.note: She can add extra snack if hungry

meal2.name: Salmon Patties
meal2.note: Cook while prepping next week - 20 min
